_source.license: Derived signal: presence + public URL only. Source URLs are public observable facts; the PoC code itself is NOT fetched or stored.
_source.name: GitHub PoC URLs (derived from Exploit-DB index)
_source.provenance: Parses the Exploit-Database files_exploits.csv ``source_url`` / ``application_url`` columns for github.com URLs. Same network fetch as the EDB build.
